name: Go Ahead and Use 'Em, Mr. Luffy!!!

issues.description: Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Card text states '[Blocker] until the end of your opponent's next End Phase', which means the effect lasts during opponent's turn. Should be 'DuringOpponentTurn' or similar extended duration, not a simple EndOfTurn.
Target scope missing type filter. Card specifies 'Up to 1 of your {Dressrosa} type Characters' but target only has 'ChooseOwnCharacter'. Should include type constraint for Dressrosa.

DSL structure uses two separate Activated triggers for choice options. This is valid but should ideally be represented as a single Activated trigger with multiple action branches to reflect the 'Choose one' mechanic more clearly.
